headline: Assessing Prologis (PLD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Softness And Long Term Momentum
summary: Prologis (PLD) is back on investors’ radar after its recent share performance, with a 1-day return of a 1.3% decline and mixed moves over the past week, month, and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Prologis. At a share price of $134.40, Prologis has seen short term pressure, with a 7 day share price return of a 3.6% decline, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 20.3% points to momentum that has been building over a longer period.
